overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban commercial district in a video game environment (GTA V), featuring wet pavement reflections, neon signage, and modern architecture. The camera moves steadily along a sidewalk and crosses a multi-lane intersection as traffic lights change.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk along multi-lane commercial street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along rain-soaked sidewalk toward an intersection with traffic lights visible ahead

entered.detail: tall modern building with illuminated windows visible across the street
low-rise commercial building with yellow facade and illuminated signage behind a retaining wall
ornate black street lamp post with glowing light
rain-soaked asphalt reflecting streetlights and vehicle headlights
wet concrete pavement with visible expansion joints
tall illuminated advertising billboard with red and white graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in an urban commercial district. The camera walks steadily along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a multi-lane street. Across the road, a modern glass office tower rises in the distance, while on the right, a yellow commercial building with bright signage sits behind a low wall. Street lamps cast warm light onto the rain-soaked pavement, creating reflective surfaces.

events.description: transitioning from concrete sidewalk onto striped crosswalk markings at intersection

agents.ego_description: stepping off the curb and beginning to cross the multi-lane intersection via the marked crosswalk

notable_agents.action: small group of pedestrians walking across the crosswalk in the opposite direction

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt
large white cylindrical planter containing a tall evergreen shrub positioned at the crosswalk entrance
vertical traffic signal showing red light for vehicles

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters a wide pedestrian crosswalk at a signalized intersection. White striped markings appear on the wet asphalt as large planters with shrubs line the crossing area. A traffic light displaying red is visible on the right, while pedestrians can be seen crossing in the opposite direction. The yellow commercial building draws closer as the crossing begins.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing across the intersection toward the opposite sidewalk as the traffic signal changes

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving through the intersection crosswalk, passing the large planters. The traffic light on the right changes from red to green midway through the crossing. The yellow commercial building recedes into the distance as the camera approaches the far side of the wide intersection, with wet pavement continuing to reflect the urban night lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk that leads across a wide, signalized city intersection. It begins by walking beside a multi-lane street where street lamps cast warm glows onto wet concrete, with a modern glass tower looming in the distance and a bright yellow commercial building to the right. As the camera approaches the intersection, the scene shifts onto a pedestrian crosswalk marked by white stripes and large shrub planters, while pedestrians move in the opposite direction. The movement continues through the crossing as the traffic light on the right transitions from red to green, causing the yellow building to recede into the background. Finally, the camera reaches the far side of the wide intersection, with the urban night lighting continuing to shimmer across the reflective asphalt.
